title: AI SusTech Datalab Intake Form
subtitle: Project intake for data & AI projects

pages.title: Welcome to the AI SusTech Datalab
pages.subtitle: Tell us about your data project
pages.description: This form helps us understand your project needs so our AI SusTech Datalab team can provide the right support. You'll be guided through a series of questions covering your use-case, regulatory requirements, data availability, and technical stack.

features.title: Project Description
features.text: Describe your data problem and desired outcome

features.title: Regulations & Compliance
features.text: METC, GDPR, NDA, and data transfer requirements

features.title: Data & Technology
features.text: Data availability, format, management, and tech stack

features.title: Download Report
features.text: Get your completed intake as Markdown or CSV

pages.title: Description of the Use-Case
pages.subtitle: Help us understand the project you have in mind.

fields.label: Describe the use-case in a popular summary.
fields.subtitle: Write a brief, accessible summary that a non-technical person could understand.

fields.label: What is the background of the problem?
fields.subtitle: Describe the context and why this problem matters.

fields.label: What is the research question / objective?
fields.subtitle: State the main question or goal you want to answer or achieve.

fields.label: What is the desired outcome?
fields.subtitle: Describe what a successful result would look like.

pages.title: Management and Regulations
pages.subtitle: Legal and ethical considerations for your project.

fields.label: Is there Medical Ethics Review Committee (METC) approval?
fields.subtitle: Does the project fall under the Medical Research Involving Human Subjects Act (WMO)?

fields.label: Does the project involve privacy-sensitive data under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)?
fields.subtitle: Consider whether any personal data is involved in the project.

fields.label: Is a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) needed to work with the data?
Is a Data Transfer Agreement needed to work with the data?

pages.title: Data Availability and Security
pages.subtitle: Tell us about the current state of your data.

fields.label: Is the data already collected or does it still need to be collected?
options: The data still needs to be collected

pages.title: Data Format
pages.subtitle: Describe the format and medium of the data.

fields.label: What is the file format?
fields.subtitle: Medium-dependent [audio, visual, etc.] — specify file extensions you expect.

fields.label: Is the project subsidized?
fields.subtitle: Subsidized projects may require a data management plan.

pages.title: Technical Stack
pages.subtitle: Help us understand your current technical landscape.

fields.label: Which elements of the data/AI stack have already been used? Why is support from the Datalab needed for this project?
fields.subtitle: E.g. data collection, cleaning, analysis, visualization, machine learning, AI, deployment.

pages.title: Summary & Download
pages.downloadInstructions: Review your answers above, then download the form as Markdown or CSV.
